releaseNotesMarkdown:
## What's new in this update

### Forge Sync improvements

_No commits since last build._

### Forge Tools improvements

- Added getdispatchrecommendations MCP tool that returns ranked agent (#1260)
- Added Connected TitleAchieved mood trigger to PersonalityEngine via (#1276)
- Added 1-second minimum threshold to prevent CPM explosion on session start (#1277)
- Fixed Pushed category filtering from managed Where(ApiCompat.Id) to native (#1283)
- Added ForgeWizard (#1287)
- Added sumsmith creator (#1278)
- Replace 3 hardcoded hex/White colors with DynamicResource bindings in ForgeToast and KeyForgeWindow (#1288)
- Fixed closes the GlobalGlow ReduceMotion leak in both ViewportPosition (#1291)
- Fixed PredictiveDefaultsBinder (#1292)
- Add RangeSelectorWindow scrollbar palette to ThemeManager runtime injection (#1293)
- Added Resting to PillMoodState enum (#1296)
- Re-enable UseWPF — required by PredictiveDefaultsBinder
- Added NebulaDrift ambient animation to status pill idle state (#1298)
- Improved RotateBackups() in KeynoteFileService (#1308)
- Fixed Sheet Order Editor Window.Animal Crossing (#1309)
- Improved Pinball Wizard mini-game with arcade juice (#1314)
- Fixed Store as instance field achievementToastTimer and clean up in OnClosing() (#1306)
- Added Sort Forge Settings behavior (#1319)
- Added ViewportPositionQuickSelect guide overlay system — a 3-step (#1335)
- Added 6 missing files (PredictiveDefaults (#1343)
- Users discover what's new through release notes — 14 shipped improvements (#1341)
- Replace nested Transaction with SubTransaction in DuplicateSheet (#1359)
- Escape all six cmd.exe metacharacters in SafeProcessArgs.ShellArg (#1362)

_(+ 37 internal/noise commit(s) hidden)_

### Plugin improvements

_No commits since last build._
